scripts.dev: bun run dev:server & bun run dev:web & wait
scripts.//serve: Production startup sequence used by docker-compose.yml — builds the web UI, then runs the server. Migrations happen automatically inside initDatabase() at server boot. One canonical definition so compose and package.json can't drift.
scripts.serve: bun run build:web && bun run src/server.ts
scripts.restart: bun run build:web && kill $(lsof -ti :7432) 2>/dev/null; bun run start
